title: 3.28.0 Hotfix 15
changes: Fixed a bug with hovering ground item labels where they wouldn't highlight immediately under certain conditions.

Fixed a bug which allowed scarabs to be ctrl+clicked into hidden slots in Eagon's Map Device. Items lost in this way can be retrieved by opening Eagon's Map Device after this patch, or by running the /recoveroldcraftingbenchitem chat command.
This patch has been deployed without restarting the servers. You will need to update your client to receive the client changes in this patch.
